module.name: order
module.spec: An Order has four fields: ID (string, auto-generated UUID), ItemName (string), Quantity (int), and Status (string: "pending", "fulfilled", "cancelled"). There is no category or priority field on an order. Orders are identified by ID for lookups.

CreateOrder generates a new order for an item. The item must exist in inventory (checked via inventory lookup) and the requested quantity must be available. The order is created with status "pending". An audit entry is recorded.

FulfillOrder transitions an order from "pending" to "fulfilled". Deducts the ordered quantity from inventory. Calculates shipping via CalculateShipping. Sends a notification. If the order is already fulfilled or cancelled, returns an error.

CancelOrder transitions an order from "pending" to "cancelled" with a reason string. If the order is already fulfilled, cancellation is rejected. An audit entry is recorded with the cancellation reason.
